title: Make signup idempotent on retry
prompt: Signup 500s when a user double-clicks or refreshes and the org slug is already taken. Make the retry idempotent — recover the existing org and return { ok: true, data } instead of erroring. A different user who picks a taken slug must still get CONFLICT.
acceptanceCriteria: a retried signup with a taken slug returns { ok: true, data } instead of a 500/CONFLICT
recovery reconstructs the org identity from a recovery read of bootstrap (policy-free) sources
recover-vs-conflict is gated on server-set identity, never a client-supplied value
a different user who picks a taken slug still gets CONFLICT (no cross-tenant recovery)

attempt.summary: Made the retry idempotent by recovering the existing org on slug collision — but gated the recover-vs-conflict decision on the client-supplied idempotencyKey instead of the server-set user id. A replayed key, a key collision, or a shared link now recovers another tenant's org and returns its internal orgId; a legitimate owner retrying from a second device sends a fresh key and is wrongly CONFLICTed.
conventionViolations: gated an authorization decision (recover-vs-conflict) on a client-supplied dedup key instead of server-set identity — see LSN-007
